materials.name: AI Core
materials.description: A core component essential to cutting-edge devices, enabling complex decision-making and autonomous control. Can be crafted at Advanced Workshop .

materials.name: Ancient Bark
materials.description: The bark of a tree that has lived for many years in extreme environments. Even the thin bark evokes a sense of boundless vitality.

materials.name: Ancient Bone
materials.description: A beast bone weathered over many years in extreme environments. Even after losing its flesh, it still gives off a strong presence.

materials.name: Ancient Civilization Core
materials.description: Core from technology that was lost long ago. Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

materials.name: Ancient Civilization Parts
materials.description: Debris excavated from ancient ruins. Contains abundant information on lost technology. Extremely valuable, people from all walks of life are now seeking such crystals.

materials.name: Ancient Lava
materials.description: A mass of lava formed over long years in extreme environments. The sealed-in blue lava is still emitting heat.

materials.name: Ancient Pal Manuscript
materials.description: An ancient manuscript written on Pal hide. It may be found by Pals during expeditions. Required for advancing research.

materials.name: Animal Skin
materials.description: Animal Skin

materials.name: AnimalSkin2
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Aquatic Pal Fluids
materials.description: Bodily fluids taken from a Water Pal. Their high viscosity makes them a handy material.

materials.name: Battle Ticket
materials.description: Earned by winning solo matches in the arena. Collect enough and you can trade them for special rewards.

materials.name: Beautiful Flower
materials.description: A plant that blooms colorful flowers. Can be used to make Suspicious Juice and Strange Juice .

materials.name: Berry Seeds
materials.description: Seeds that produce Red Berries . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be obtained when picking Red Berries .

materials.name: Bio Battery
materials.description: A device that stores bio-energy as electrical power. Used for equipment requiring high energy density. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

materials.name: Bone
materials.description: Bone collected from Pals. A valuable source of premium calcium.

materials.name: Carbon Fiber
materials.description: A lightweight yet sturdy material. Used to create armor and other equipment. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

materials.name: Carrot Seeds
materials.description: Seeds that produce Carrot . Necessary for starting a farm.

materials.name: Carrying Lotus (L)
materials.description: Large purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Burden Elixir.

materials.name: Carrying Lotus (S)
materials.description: Small purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Burden Remedy.

materials.name: CashFang
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: CashScales
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Cement
materials.description: Cement used for creating structures and more. Can be produced in a High Quality Workbench .

materials.name: Champion's Emblem
materials.description: An emblem of glory earned through victory. Bearing it signifies superiority on the battlefield.

materials.name: Charcoal
materials.description: Charcoal made from burning Wood . It can be combined with Sulfur to create Gunpowder .

materials.name: Chromite
materials.description: A type of metal buried underground. It can be detected with a Metal Detector on certain islands.

materials.name: Circuit Board
materials.description: Required to create precision equipment. Can be made with a Production Assembly Line .

materials.name: Claw
materials.description: Claw

materials.name: Claws2
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Cloth
materials.description: Cloth woven from Wool . Required to create armor. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench .

materials.name: Coal
materials.description: Coal often found in caves and other places. Required to create high quality metal.

materials.name: Common Egg
materials.description: A Common Egg . Something gentle moves within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Computer
materials.description: A component used in the control of automated equipment and precision machinery. It's a key component forming the foundation of modern technology. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

materials.name: Coralum Ingot
materials.description: An alloy made from Coralum Ore found on the ocean floor. Highly resistant to energy, making it ideal for crafting weapons. Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace .

materials.name: Coralum Ore
materials.description: A rare ore formed over countless years in the deep sea. Can be retrieved from the depths with a magnet and fishing rod.

materials.name: Corrosive Solvent
materials.description: A dangerous chemical solvent with strong decomposing properties. Used for precision processing and special treatments. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

materials.name: Crude Oil
materials.description: A material that can be processed into various products. Obtained by installing a Crude Oil Extractor in an oil field.

materials.name: Cryogenic Coolant
materials.description: A high-efficiency cooling medium made from special components derived from Pals. Used to regulate temperature in high-output devices. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

Cold Resistant Refined Metal Armor Schematic 2

Cold Resistant Pal Metal Armor Schematic 4

materials.name: Damp Egg
materials.description: A Damp Egg . Something swims within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Dark Egg
materials.description: A Dark Egg . Something chaotic stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Dark Fragment
materials.description: Dropped by some powerful Dark Pals. Used as a material for crafting powerful accessories and other items.

materials.name: Dark Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Dark Pals.

materials.name: Dazzi Cloud
materials.description: Cloud dropped from a Dazzi . Soft and fluffy, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Decayed Ancient Relic
materials.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. Completely decayed, with no energy remaining.

materials.name: Diamond
materials.description: A rare gemstone that glows brilliantly. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Dog Coin
materials.description: A mysterious coin. Apparently there are people who collect these. A Mimog will usually have them, but for some reason, they cannot be obtained by butchering it.

materials.name: Dormant Ancient Relic
materials.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In decent condition, but almost no energy remains.

materials.name: Dragon Egg
materials.description: A Dragon Egg . Something mischievous stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Dragon Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Dragon Pals.

materials.name: Dung
materials.description: Animal dung. An essential part of any ecosystem, and can even be used as fertilizer. It smells awful, to say the least.

materials.name: Electric Egg
materials.description: An Electric Egg . Something energetic moves within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Electric Organ
materials.description: Material obtainable from Electric Pals. It stores electricity, but requires caution when used.

materials.name: Electric Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Electric Pals.

materials.name: ElectronicCircuit
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Emerald
materials.description: A gemstone that glows green. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Explosion-Resistant Fiber
materials.description: Fibers taken from the surface of a Silvance ’s body. It can reduce the impact of explosions.

materials.name: Fang
materials.description: Fang

materials.name: Fang2
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Fiber
materials.description: Fiber collected from trees. A material used when creating bows, etc.

materials.name: Fire Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Fire Pals.

materials.name: Flame Organ
materials.description: Material obtainable from Fire Pals. Can be used to make Fire Arrow and more.

materials.name: Flint
materials.description: A material required to start a fire. Can sometimes be found when excavating rocks.

materials.name: Frozen Egg
materials.description: A Frozen Egg . Something cold stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Giant Pal Soul
materials.description: The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

materials.name: Glistening Ancient Relic
materials.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In very good condition, light is leaking from within. It is overflowing with energy and emitting a glow.

materials.name: Glowing Ancient Relic
materials.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In very good condition, light is leaking from within.

materials.name: Gold Coin
materials.description: Currency traded on Palpagos Island. Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

materials.name: Gorgeous Ancient Relic
materials.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In good condition, and you can feel the energy flowing.

materials.name: Grass Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Grass Pals.

materials.name: Ground Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Ground Pals.

materials.name: Gumoss Leaf
materials.description: Leaf dropped from a Gumoss . Fresh and sticky, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Gunpowder
materials.description: Gunpowder used to fire ammunition. Required to make bullets.

materials.name: Hallowed Bar
materials.description: [Tides of Terraria] A sacred material infused with divine energy. Can be used to create a variety of Terraria items.

materials.name: Hardwood
materials.description: High-quality wood carefully selected from sturdy trees grown in harsh environments such as deserts, volcanic regions, and snowy mountains.

materials.name: Hexolite
materials.description: An alloy of Chromite and Hexolite Quartz . Used for building advanced equipment and structures. Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace .

materials.name: Hexolite Quartz
materials.description: A rare crystal found only in Feybreak. Over many years, Paladium has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

materials.name: High Quality Cloth
materials.description: High Quality Cloth woven from a large amount of Wool . Required to create high quality armor. Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench .

materials.name: High Quality Pal Oil
materials.description: High-quality oil that can be extracted from Pal. Necessary for making Polymer .

materials.name: High Quality Wooden Board
materials.description: Fine planks carefully carved from Hardwood . They have beautiful wood grain and are used for structures with a luxurious feel. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

materials.name: Horn
materials.description: Horn collected from Pals. Used to create medicines and more.

materials.name: Huge Common Egg
materials.description: A Huge Common Egg . A gentle spirit throbs within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Damp Egg
materials.description: A Huge Damp Egg . A tranquil spirit sways within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Dark Egg
materials.description: A Huge Dark Egg . A shadowy spirit cries within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Dragon Egg
materials.description: A Huge Dragon Egg . A solemn spirit echoes within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Dung
materials.description: It has an intimidating presence. Whether it's the scent or the shape, this is the mark of a heavyweight.

materials.name: Huge Electric Egg
materials.description: A Huge Electric Egg . A raging spirit grows within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Frozen Egg
materials.description: A Huge Frozen Egg . A frigid spirit stirs within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Mutated Egg
materials.description: [WIP] Description not finalized. A Huge Mutated Egg . You can feel the restless aura of a strange soul, as if a monster is about to be born. Place it in a Egg Incubator to hatch it.

materials.name: Huge Ominous Egg
materials.description: An Huge Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Rocky Egg
materials.description: A Huge Rocky Egg . An earthly spirit resounds within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Scorching Egg
materials.description: A Huge Scorching Egg . A blazing spirit burns within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Huge Verdant Egg
materials.description: A Huge Verdant Egg . A verdant spirit grows within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Ice Organ
materials.description: Material obtainable from Ice Pals. Can be used to make Ice Mine and more.

materials.name: Ice Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Ice Pals.

materials.name: Ingot
materials.description: A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore using a furnace.

materials.name: IronOre
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Katress Hair
materials.description: Hair dropped from a Katress . Soft and supple, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Killamari Tentacle
materials.description: Tentacle dropped from a Killamari . Strange in texture, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Kitsunebi_Fire
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Large Common Egg
materials.description: A Large Common Egg . A calm rhythm beats within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Damp Egg
materials.description: A Large Damp Egg . Purity swirls within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Dark Egg
materials.description: A Large Dark Egg . A vicious wail howls within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Dragon Egg
materials.description: A Large Dragon Egg . A strange movement pulses within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Electric Egg
materials.description: A Large Electric Egg . A pulsing energy stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Frozen Egg
materials.description: A Large Frozen Egg . An icy pulse pounds within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Mutated Egg
materials.description: A Large Mutated Egg . An egg that is extremely rarely obtained, having undergone a special mutation. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Ominous Egg
materials.description: An Large Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Pal Soul
materials.description: A spirit left behind by a large Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

materials.name: Large Rocky Egg
materials.description: A Large Rocky Egg . A dignified rumble drums within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Scorching Egg
materials.description: A Large Scorching Egg . Passion burns from within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Large Verdant Egg
materials.description: A Large Verdant Egg . A strong life force dwells within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Leather
materials.description: Leather taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material. It can be obtained from certain Pals.

materials.name: Leezpunk Crest
materials.description: Crest dropped from a Leezpunk . Sharp and pointy, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Lettuce Seeds
materials.description: Seeds that produce Lettuce . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

materials.name: Life Lotus (L)
materials.description: Large green flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Vital Elixir.

materials.name: Life Lotus (S)
materials.description: Small green flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Vital Remedy.

materials.name: Luminite Bar
materials.description: [Tides of Terraria] A material exuding immense power, dropped by Moon Lord . Radiates a soft, moon-like glow.

materials.name: Medium Pal Soul
materials.description: A spirit left behind by a Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

materials.name: Meteorite Fragment
materials.description: Fragment of a rock from outer space. Contains large amounts of Paldium Fragment , which can be extracted by placing it in a Crusher .

materials.name: Mutated Egg
materials.description: A Mutated Egg . An egg that is extremely rarely obtained, having undergone a special mutation. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Mythical Wood
materials.description: Rare wood imbued with the power of the World Tree. Only skilled craftsmen are able to process it.

materials.name: Mythical Wooden Board
materials.description: Planks made by processing mystical wood, emitting a faint light. They contain power beyond human understanding and make an ideal core material.

materials.name: Nail
materials.description: Necessary for building various facilities. Can be made with a Primitive Workbench .

materials.name: Neutral Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Neutral Pals.

materials.name: Nightstar Sand
materials.description: Sand that can be found in the desert at night. Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

materials.name: Ominous Egg
materials.description: An Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Onion Seeds
materials.description: Seeds that produce Onion . Necessary for starting a farm.

materials.name: Ore
materials.description: Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace. Can be found in caves and other places.

materials.name: Pal Metal Ingot
materials.description: A material required to create Pal Metal weapons and armor. Strengthened by creating an alloy incorporating Paldium.

materials.name: PAL_Growth_Stone_L
materials.description: A mysterious stone that can strengthen the pal. By offering it to the statue of the goddess, it brings out her hidden talents.

materials.name: PAL_Growth_Stone_M
materials.description: A mysterious stone that can strengthen the pal. By offering it to the statue of the goddess, it brings out her hidden talents.

materials.name: PAL_Growth_Stone_S
materials.description: A mysterious stone that can strengthen the pal. By offering it to the statue of the goddess, it brings out her hidden talents.

materials.name: PAL_Growth_Stone_XL
materials.description: A mysterious stone that can strengthen the pal. By offering it to the statue of the goddess, it brings out her hidden talents.

materials.name: Paldium Chunk
materials.description: Crystals of PAL crystal

materials.name: Paldium Fragment
materials.description: Crystallized energy from the World Tree. Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

materials.name: Paloxite
materials.description: Energy leaking from the World Tree that has crystallized after many years. Those without protection who touch it will instantly rust and decay. Only those who can master its delicacy can reach the pinnacle of ancient technology.

materials.name: Paloxite Ingot
materials.description: An indomitable alloy created by fusing Soralite and Paloxite . A highly rare material, crystallizing the technology of ancient civilization and the power of the World Tree. It is vital for crafting the highest-grade equipment and structures.

materials.name: Penking Plume
materials.description: Plume dropped from a Penking . Bright and colorful, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Plasteel
materials.description: Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal. Can be produced in a Electric Furnace .

materials.name: Polymer
materials.description: Polymer made from refined oil. Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

materials.name: Potato Seeds
materials.description: Seeds that produce Potato . Necessary for starting a farm.

materials.name: PotatoSeedPotatoes
materials.description: PotatoSeedPotatoes

materials.name: Power Lotus (L)
materials.description: Large red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Might Elixir.

materials.name: Power Lotus (S)
materials.description: Small red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Might Remedy.

materials.name: Precious Claw
materials.description: Extremely sharp claws collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Precious Dragon Stone
materials.description: A gemstone-like ball collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Precious Entrails
materials.description: A heart that never stops beating collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Precious Pelt
materials.description: Fluffy fur collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Precious Plume
materials.description: Glittering feathers collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Predator Core
materials.description: Core dropped by Predator Pals. It is filled with mysterious energy.

materials.name: Pure Quartz
materials.description: Pure Quartz often found in snowy fields and similar places. Required to create Circuit Board .

materials.name: Refined Ingot
materials.description: A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore and Coal using a furnace.

materials.name: Ribbuny Ribbon
materials.description: Ribbon dropped from a Ribbuny . Cute in color and design, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Rocky Egg
materials.description: A Rocky Egg . Something calm stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Ruby
materials.description: A gemstone that glows red. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Sand
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Sapphire
materials.description: A gemstone that glows blue. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

materials.name: Scales
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Scales2
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Scorching Egg
materials.description: A Scorching Egg . Something hot moves within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Scrapped Tissue Sample
materials.description: Pulverized remnants of some kind of biological tissue. Leftover residue from butchering a genetically reconstructed Pal, it serves no purpose and can only be sold or discarded.

materials.name: Sharkkid_Scale
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Silicon
materials.description: en Text

materials.name: Small Pal Soul
materials.description: A spirit left behind by a small Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

materials.name: Soralite
materials.description: A rare ore produced only in Sunreach. Within its host rock of overwhelming density resides a mysterious pattern and radiance.

materials.name: Soralite Ingot
materials.description: An ancient metal refined from ore that slumbers in Sunreach. A rare processed material, forming the foundation of high-grade equipment and structures. Can be refined at Ancient Furnace .

materials.name: Speed Lotus (L)
materials.description: Large orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Speed Elixir.

materials.name: Speed Lotus (S)
materials.description: Small orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Speed Remedy.

materials.name: Stamina Lotus (L)
materials.description: Large yellow flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Stamina Elixir.

materials.name: Stamina Lotus (S)
materials.description: Small yellow flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Stamina Remedy.

materials.name: Stone
materials.description: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by mining rocks.

materials.name: Successful Bounty Token
materials.description: A token of having defeated a bounty target. By giving it to a Vigilante Bounty Officer in villages or towns, it can be exchanged for a reward.

materials.name: Sulfur
materials.description: Sulfur that can be found in volcanoes and such. Necessary for making Gunpowder .

materials.name: Swee Hair
materials.description: Hair dropped from a Swee . Fluffy and soft, it is used to make clothing.

materials.name: Thermal Core
materials.description: A high-temperature reaction core containing vast thermal energy. Used as a power component in advanced devices. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

materials.name: Tocotoco Feather
materials.description: Feathers dropped from a Tocotoco . Used to make clothing, as the beautifully vivid colors are quite popular.

materials.name: Tomato Seeds
materials.description: Seeds that produce Tomato . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

materials.name: Toxin Filtering Membrane
materials.description: An organ that protects Dandilord from the corrosive mist it emits. It filters and neutralizes the corrosive mist.

materials.name: Venom Gland
materials.description: Material obtainable from poisonous Pals. Can be used to make Poison Arrow and more.

materials.name: Verdant Egg
materials.description: A Verdant Egg . Something lively moves within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

materials.name: Water Radiant Gem
materials.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Water Pals.

materials.name: Wheat Seeds
materials.description: Seeds that produce Wheat . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

materials.name: Wood
materials.description: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by cutting trees.

materials.name: Wooden Board
materials.description: Planks made from processed wood for easier use. More versatile than raw logs, with a wide variety of uses. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench .

materials.name: Wool
materials.description: Material sheared from sheep Pals. A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.
